ecarx.carext.connect.net.wifi

Interface IExternalWifiSta

  • All Superinterfaces:
    BaseAPI

    public interface IExternalWifiSta
extends BaseAPI
    This class provides the API for managing Wi-Fi sta connectivity provided by external hardware.
    Since:
    4

    • Nested Class Summary

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface ecarx.carext.base.BaseAPI

        BaseAPI.Callback

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Default Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      default int addNetwork(android.net.wifi.WifiConfiguration config)
      Add a new network description to the set of configured networks.
      default void connect(android.net.wifi.WifiConfiguration config, ActionListener listener)
      Connect to a network with the given configuration.
      default boolean disconnect()
      Disassociate from the currently active access point.
      default boolean enableNetwork(int netId, boolean attemptConnect)
      Allow a previously configured network to be associated with.
      default java.util.List<android.net.wifi.WifiConfiguration> getConfiguredNetworks()
      Return a list of all the networks configured for the current foreground user.
      default android.net.wifi.WifiInfo getConnectionInfo()
      Return dynamic information about the current Wi-Fi connection, if any is active.
      default FunctionStatus getFunctionStatus()
      Get current function status.
      default java.util.List<android.net.wifi.ScanResult> getScanResults()
      Return the results of the latest access point scan.
      default int getWifiState()
      Gets the Wi-Fi enabled state.
      default boolean isWifiEnabled()
      Return whether Wi-Fi is enabled or disabled.
      default boolean registerConnectionListener(StaConnectionListener listener)
      Register an observer to obtain connection info change event.
      default boolean registerScanResultListener(StaScanResultListener listener)
      Register an observer to obtain scan result event.
      default boolean registerWifiStateListener(StaStateListener listener)
      Register an observer to obtain state change event.
      default boolean removeNetwork(int netId)
      Remove the specified network from the list of configured networks.
      default boolean setWifiEnabled(boolean enabled)
      Enable or disable Wi-Fi.
      default boolean startScan()
      Request a scan for access points.
      default void unregisterConnectionListener(StaConnectionListener listener)
      Unregister the observer.
      default void unregisterScanResultListener(StaScanResultListener listener)
      Unregister the observer.
      default void unregisterWifiStateListener(StaStateListener listener)
      Unregister the observer.

      • Methods inherited from interface ecarx.carext.base.BaseAPI

        init, onRelease

    • Method Detail

      • getFunctionStatus

        @NonNull
 @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_WIFI_STA")
default FunctionStatus getFunctionStatus()
        Get current function status.
        Since:
        4

      • setWifiEnabled

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_WIFI_STA")
default boolean setWifiEnabled(boolean enabled)
        Enable or disable Wi-Fi.
        Parameters:
        enabled - true to enable, false to disable.
        Returns:
        false if the request cannot be satisfied; true indicates that wifi is either already in the requested state, or in progress toward the requested state.
        Since:
        4

      • getWifiState

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_WIFI_STA")
default int getWifiState()
        Gets the Wi-Fi enabled state.
        Returns:
        One of WifiManager.WIFI_STATE_DISABLED, WifiManager.WIFI_STATE_DISABLING, WifiManager.WIFI_STATE_ENABLED, WifiManager.WIFI_STATE_ENABLING, WifiManager.WIFI_STATE_UNKNOWN
        Since:
        4
        See Also:
        isWifiEnabled()

      • isWifiEnabled

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_WIFI_STA")
default boolean isWifiEnabled()
        Return whether Wi-Fi is enabled or disabled.
        Returns:
        true if Wi-Fi is enabled
        Since:
        4
        See Also:
        getWifiState()

      • registerWifiStateListener

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_WIFI_STA")
default boolean registerWifiStateListener(@NonNull
                                                                                                                StaStateListener listener)
        Register an observer to obtain state change event.
        Parameters:
        listener - The callback that will run.
        Returns:
        true if the operation succeeded, false otherwise.
        Since:
        4

      • unregisterWifiStateListener

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_WIFI_STA")
default void unregisterWifiStateListener(@NonNull
                                                                                                               StaStateListener listener)
        Unregister the observer.
        Parameters:
        listener - The callback that don't want to receive event.
        Since:
        4

      • getConfiguredNetworks

        @NonNull
 @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_WIFI_STA")
default java.util.List<android.net.wifi.WifiConfiguration> getConfiguredNetworks()
        Return a list of all the networks configured for the current foreground user.
        Returns:
        a list of network configurations in the form of a list of WifiConfiguration objects.
        Since:
        4

      • addNetwork

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_WIFI_STA")
default int addNetwork(@NonNull
                                                                                             android.net.wifi.WifiConfiguration config)
        Add a new network description to the set of configured networks. The networkId field of the supplied configuration object is ignored.

        The new network will be marked DISABLED by default. To enable it, called enableNetwork(int, boolean).

        Parameters:
        config - the set of variables that describe the configuration, contained in a WifiConfiguration object.
        Returns:
        the ID of the newly created network description. This is used in other operations to specified the network to be acted upon. Returns -1 on failure.
        Since:
        4

      • removeNetwork

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_WIFI_STA")
default boolean removeNetwork(int netId)
        Remove the specified network from the list of configured networks. This may result in the asynchronous delivery of state change events.
        Parameters:
        netId - the ID of the network as returned by addNetwork(android.net.wifi.WifiConfiguration) or getConfiguredNetworks().
        Returns:
        true if the operation succeeded
        Since:
        4

      • enableNetwork

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_WIFI_STA")
default boolean enableNetwork(int netId,
                                                                                                    boolean attemptConnect)
        Allow a previously configured network to be associated with. If attemptConnect is true, an attempt to connect to the selected network is initiated. This may result in the asynchronous delivery of state change events.
        Parameters:
        netId - the ID of the network as returned by addNetwork(android.net.wifi.WifiConfiguration) or getConfiguredNetworks().
        attemptConnect - The way to select a particular network to connect to is specify true for this parameter.
        Returns:
        true if the operation succeeded
        Since:
        4

      • startScan

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_WIFI_STA")
default boolean startScan()
        Request a scan for access points. Returns immediately. The availability of the results is made known later by means of an asynchronous event sent on completion of the scan.
        Returns:
        true if the operation succeeded, i.e., the scan was initiated.
        Since:
        4

      • getScanResults

        @NonNull
 @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_WIFI_STA")
default java.util.List<android.net.wifi.ScanResult> getScanResults()
        Return the results of the latest access point scan.
        Returns:
        the list of access points found in the most recent scan.
        Since:
        4

      • registerScanResultListener

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_WIFI_STA")
default boolean registerScanResultListener(@NonNull
                                                                                                                 StaScanResultListener listener)
        Register an observer to obtain scan result event.
        Parameters:
        listener - The callback that will run.
        Returns:
        true if the operation succeeded, false otherwise.
        Since:
        4

      • unregisterScanResultListener

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_WIFI_STA")
default void unregisterScanResultListener(@NonNull
                                                                                                                StaScanResultListener listener)
        Unregister the observer.
        Parameters:
        listener - The callback that don't want to receive event.
        Since:
        4

      • connect

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_WIFI_STA")
default void connect(@NonNull
                                                                                           android.net.wifi.WifiConfiguration config,
                                                                                           @Nullable
                                                                                           ActionListener listener)
        Connect to a network with the given configuration. The network also gets added to the list of configured networks for the foreground user.

        For a new network, this function is used instead of a sequence of addNetwork(), enableNetwork(), and reconnect()

        Parameters:
        config - the set of variables that describe the configuration, contained in a WifiConfiguration object.
        listener - for callbacks on success or failure. Can be null.
        Since:
        4

      • disconnect

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_WIFI_STA")
default boolean disconnect()
        Disassociate from the currently active access point. This may result in the asynchronous delivery of state change events.
        Returns:
        true if the operation succeeded
        Since:
        4

      • getConnectionInfo

        @Nullable
 @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_WIFI_STA")
default android.net.wifi.WifiInfo getConnectionInfo()
        Return dynamic information about the current Wi-Fi connection, if any is active.
        Returns:
        the Wi-Fi information, contained in WifiInfo.
        Since:
        4

      • registerConnectionListener

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_WIFI_STA")
default boolean registerConnectionListener(@NonNull
                                                                                                                 StaConnectionListener listener)
        Register an observer to obtain connection info change event.
        Parameters:
        listener - The callback that will run.
        Returns:
        true if the operation succeeded, false otherwise.
        Since:
        4

      • unregisterConnectionListener

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_WIFI_STA")
default void unregisterConnectionListener(@NonNull
                                                                                                                StaConnectionListener listener)
        Unregister the observer.
        Parameters:
        listener - The callback that don't want to receive event.
        Since:
        4
